panels.title: Welcome to Web DataShare Telemetry Portal

options.content:
# 📊 Web DataShare - Operations & Monitoring Portal

Welcome to the centralized monitoring and telemetry dashboard. From here, you can navigate the various metric pages to track application and infrastructure performance.

### 🧭 Table of Contents

1. **[Overall Pod & Container Metrics](/grafana/d/overall-pod-metrics/overall-pod-container-metrics)**
   * Exposes CPU, Memory, Network, and Disk utilization for all **12 containers** in the stack.
   * Features PromQL historical average baselines, standard deviation bounds, and frequency distribution (bell-curve) histogram analysis.

2. **[Application Function Metrics](/grafana/d/function-performance/application-function-performance-metrics)**
   * Monitors internal Python backend execution times and success rates classified by category (reads, writes, updates, LLM queries, and visualization loads).
   * Filters performance statistics and plots frequency distributions side-by-side with execution averages.

3. **[Cross-Pod Comparison](/grafana/d/cross-pod-comparison/cross-pod-comparison)**
   * Contrasts resource footprints and response times side-by-side across load-balanced replicas and different services.

4. **[Incident Triangulation](/grafana/d/incident-triangulation/incident-triangulation)**
   * Integrates centralized logs (from Elasticsearch/Vector) side-by-side with container resource metrics for fast incident troubleshooting.
